name: AlphaPolis Co., Ltd.
summary: AlphaPolis Co., Ltd. engages in Internet site management and books publishing businesses in Japan. The company publishes light novels, cartoons, and paperbacks, as well as other books comprising general novels and translation publications of overseas books. It also operates Alphapolis, a platform for viewing content, such as novels. AlphaPolis Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
